page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Unit 3 page 26: the ow sound pattern. Distinguish the two common sounds, then do short listening and writing checks.
entry_probe_questions: Can you hear the difference between cow and snow?

assumed_prior_knowledge.topic: basic word reading and sound awareness from earlier phonics work

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Distinguish the two common ow sounds.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Introduce ow as in cow and ow as in snow with a small contrast set.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Pick the odd word out by ow sound.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Listen and circle the word with a different ow pronunciation.
entry_probe_questions: Which word sounds different: cow, snow, down?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Write target words from short ow sentences.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Listen and complete flower, down, and tomorrow in short prompts.
entry_probe_questions: Can you hear flower in I see a yellow flower?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Copy one correct sentence with an ow target word.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Use one short sentence from the page for controlled writing.
entry_probe_questions: Can you copy one short sentence correctly?

mastery_signal_examples.mastered: Learner distinguishes the two ow sounds correctly.
mastery_signal_examples.shaky: Learner gets some contrast pairs right but not all.
mastery_signal_examples.not_mastered: Learner cannot hear or produce the contrast.

mastery_signal_examples.mastered: Learner finds the odd sound-out word correctly.
mastery_signal_examples.shaky: Learner needs repetition for the contrast task.
mastery_signal_examples.not_mastered: Learner cannot identify the different sound.

mastery_signal_examples.mastered: Learner writes flower, down, and tomorrow correctly.
mastery_signal_examples.shaky: Learner catches one or two words only.
mastery_signal_examples.not_mastered: Learner cannot map the sounds to the written words.

mastery_signal_examples.mastered: Learner copies one short sentence accurately.
mastery_signal_examples.shaky: Learner copies most words but misses a target word.
